requirement_topic.en: CRA Mandatory Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: CRA强制无线电/电信终端设备型号认证
requirement_topic.zht: CRA強制無線電/電信終端設備型號認證

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, IoT, and any device using radio spectrum) must obtain mandatory type approval from Iran's Communications Regulatory Authority (CRA — سازمان تنظیم مقررات و ارتباطات رادیویی) under the Law on Telecommunications of Iran before import or sale in Iran. CRA manages spectrum allocation and issues approvals for radio equipment; the Ministry of Communications and Information Technology (MCIT/MOC) sets overarching telecom policy. Test reports from an accredited laboratory against applicable INSO (Iran National Standards Organization) standards — which reference CISPR, IEC, and ITU frameworks — are required as part of the application. CE Declaration of Conformity, FCC ID, SRRC approval, and CCC certification are not accepted by CRA as substitutes for Iranian type approval.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa、物联网及任何使用无线频谱的设备）须依据伊朗电信法取得伊朗通信监管局（CRA — سازمان تنظیم مقررات و ارتباطات رادیویی）的强制型号认证，方可在伊朗进口或销售。CRA负责频谱分配并签发无线电设备批准；通信和信息技术部（MCIT/MOC）制定总体电信政策。申请时须提交经认可实验室依据适用INSO（伊朗国家标准化组织）标准（参照CISPR、IEC及ITU框架）出具的测试报告。CE符合性声明、FCC ID、SRRC批准及CCC认证不被CRA接受为伊朗型号认证的替代。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa、物聯網及任何使用無線頻譜的設備）須依據伊朗電信法取得伊朗通信監管局（CRA — سازمان تنظیم مقررات و ارتباطات رادیویی）的強制型號認證，方可在伊朗進口或銷售。CRA負責頻譜分配並簽發無線電設備批准；通信和信息技術部（MCIT/MOC）制定總體電信政策。申請時須提交經認可實驗室依據適用INSO（伊朗國家標準化組織）標準（參照CISPR、IEC及ITU框架）出具的測試報告。CE符合性聲明、FCC ID、SRRC批准及CCC認證不被CRA接受為伊朗型號認證的替代。

standards_or_laws: Law on Telecommunications of Iran (قانون تجارت الکترونیک and related telecom legislation)
CRA Radio Equipment Type Approval Regulations
INSO national standards referencing CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 (EMC for multimedia equipment)
MCIT / MOC overarching telecom policy directives

summary.en: In China, radio type approval is administered by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China). Telecom terminal equipment (devices connecting to public telecom networks) additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety and EMC for in-scope products under the CCC catalogue. GB standards (GB 9254, GB/T 17625 for EMC; GB 4943 for safety) form the technical baseline.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电型号认证由工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）负责。连接公共电信网络的电信终端设备还须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）涵盖列入CCC目录的产品的电气安全和EMC。GB标准（电磁兼容：GB 9254、GB/T 17625；安全：GB 4943）构成技术基准。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電型號認證由工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）負責。連接公共電信網路的電信終端設備還須取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）涵蓋列入CCC目錄的產品的電氣安全和EMC。GB標準（電磁相容：GB 9254、GB/T 17625；安全：GB 4943）構成技術基準。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration, Article 58)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Telecom Equipment Access

gap.en: CRA type approval is a wholly independent process from SRRC, CCC, CE, or FCC. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC certification is recognised by CRA. There is no mutual recognition arrangement between Iran and China, the EU, or the US for radio equipment approvals. A fresh CRA application with accredited-lab test reports to INSO/IEC standards, submitted through a registered Iranian importer or agent, is required for every model imported or sold in Iran.
gap.zh: CRA型号认证与SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全独立。CRA不承认SRRC批准或CCC认证。伊朗与中国、欧盟或美国之间在无线电设备认证方面不存在相互承认协议。每款在伊朗进口或销售的产品均须通过注册伊朗进口商或代理，重新提交依据INSO/IEC标准由经认可实验室出具测试报告的CRA申请。
gap.zht: CRA型號認證與SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全獨立。CRA不承認SRRC批准或CCC認證。伊朗與中國、歐盟或美國之間在無線電設備認證方面不存在相互承認協議。每款在伊朗進口或銷售的產品均須透過已登記的伊朗進口商或代理，重新提交依據INSO/IEC標準由經認可實驗室出具測試報告的CRA申請。

source.publisher: CRA — Communications Regulatory Authority of Iran (سازمان تنظیم مقررات و ارتباطات رادیویی)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CRA mandatory type approval is required for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Iran. SRRC, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC ID are not accepted substitutes. No Iran–China mutual recognition arrangement exists. Applications must be submitted via a registered Iranian importer or agent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 所有在伊朗进口或销售的无线及电信终端设备须强制取得CRA型号认证。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作为替代。伊朗与中国之间不存在相互承认协议。申请须通过注册伊朗进口商或代理提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 所有在伊朗進口或銷售的無線及電信終端設備須強制取得CRA型號認證。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作為替代。伊朗與中國之間不存在相互承認協議。申請須透過已登記的伊朗進口商或代理提交。
